items.name: Iron Sword
items.description: A sturdy iron blade. Reliable, if unremarkable.

items.name: Wooden Club
items.description: A heavy club carved from dense hardwood. Has a chance to stun on impact.

items.name: Hunting Knife
items.description: A sharp, lightweight blade favored by scouts and hunters.

items.name: Simple Bow
items.description: A basic shortbow made from flexible yew. Effective at medium range.

items.name: Light Crossbow
items.description: A mechanically simple crossbow. Packs a punch but has limited range.

items.name: Wooden Spear
items.description: A long-hafted spear with decent reach. Standard issue for militia training.

items.name: Verdant Blade
items.description: A sword imbued with nature magic. Leaves trail vines with each swing.

items.name: Thornwood Axe
items.description: An axe hewn from thornwood, its edge studded with natural barbs.

items.name: Shadow Dagger
items.description: A blade that drinks light. Grants enhanced stealth to its wielder.

items.name: Sap-Infused Bow
items.description: A bow soaked in enchanted blue sap. Arrows carry a faint magical charge.

items.name: Bloomguard Mace
items.description: Standard-issue mace of the Bloomguard. Its weighted head delivers punishing blows.

items.name: Wildkin Shortbow
items.description: Crafted by Wildkin scouts, this bow is especially lethal against beasts.

items.name: Sporecaller Staff
items.description: A gnarled staff crowned with luminescent mushrooms. Amplifies spore-based magic.

items.name: Emerald Edge
items.description: A crystalline blade that pulses with verdant energy. Heals the wielder with each strike.

items.name: Crimson Cleaver
items.description: Forged in volcanic vents beneath the Crimson Spire. Burns with perpetual flame.

items.name: Veilkeeper's Athame
items.description: A ritual blade carried by Veilkeeper acolytes. Channels ambient DSP from the Veil.

items.name: Ancient Longbow
items.description: A relic bow from the old growth. Its arrows pierce through armor with ease.

items.name: Rootbinder Spear
items.description: Living roots spiral along its shaft. On critical hits, roots erupt to bind the target.

items.name: Thornlash Whip
items.description: A whip woven from living thornvines. Lashes tear flesh and leave bleeding wounds.

items.name: Everbloom Sword
items.description: A radiant blade that blooms with light when it strikes true. Killing blows send healing pollen to nearby allies.

items.name: Scar's Edge
items.description: An axe forged from void-scarred metal. Each wound it inflicts tears at the fabric of reality.

items.name: Nexus Staff
items.description: Channeling raw Nexus energy, this staff amplifies all spellcasting to devastating effect.

items.name: Wildkin's Fang
items.description: Carved from the fang of an ancient wildkin alpha. Strengthens the bond with beast companions.

items.name: Everwood's Heartwood
items.description: The living heart of the Everwood itself, granted only when all Veilkeepers survive and the forest's DSP flows at its peak. Radiates an aura of absolute purity.

requirements.special: All Veilkeepers must be alive and DSP must be 90+

items.name: Void Architect's Blade
items.description: The weapon of the Void Architect themselves. Reality warps and fractures around its edge. Drops only from the final confrontation.

items.name: Leather Tunic
items.description: Simple leather armor. Offers modest protection without restricting movement.

items.name: Hide Armor
items.description: Armor fashioned from thick beast hide. Decent protection at a small cost to agility.

items.name: Iron Chain
items.description: Interlocking iron rings provide strong protection, but weigh heavily on the wearer.

items.name: Wooden Shield
items.description: A round shield of reinforced wood. Provides additional blocking capability.

items.name: Bloomguard Scout Armor
items.description: Lightweight armor worn by Bloomguard scouts. Reinforced with flexible thornweave.

items.name: Thornbinder Leather
items.description: Dark leather armor woven with shadow-infused thornvine. Favored by those who move unseen.

items.name: Verdant Mail
items.description: Chain mail reinforced with living vines. The forest sustains its wearer.

items.name: Ironbark Plate
items.description: Plate armor carved from ironbark — wood as strong as steel, but lighter.

items.name: Moss Shield
items.description: A living shield covered in regenerative moss. Slowly mends its bearer's wounds.

items.name: Emerald Robes
items.description: Flowing robes woven with emerald thread. They hum with deep spiritual power.

items.name: Shadowweave Armor
items.description: Armor spun from shadow silk. Its wearer flickers between seen and unseen.

items.name: Crimson Plate
items.description: Plate forged in the Crimson Spire's furnaces. Radiates heat that deflects flame.

items.name: Rootguard Armor
items.description: Living roots form interlocking plates across this armor, granting resilience against binding magics.

items.name: Crystal Shield
items.description: A translucent shield grown from pure Nexus crystal. Reflects hostile magic back at attackers.

items.name: Veilkeeper's Vestments
items.description: Sacred garments of the Veilkeeper order. The Veil's energy flows freely through their weave, reducing the cost of spiritual consultation.

items.name: Bloomguard Commander's Plate
items.description: The legendary armor of a Bloomguard Commander. Its enchanted plates regenerate damage over time.

items.name: Living Bark Armor
items.description: Armor grown from a living tree. It breathes, heals, and fights alongside its wearer.

items.name: Shadow Mantle
items.description: A cloak of concentrated shadow. When the wearer delivers a killing blow, they vanish from sight.

items.name: Everwood Aegis
items.description: The Everwood's ultimate shield — forged from heartwood, crystal, and pure DSP. Grants unparalleled protection and spiritual resilience.

items.name: Nexus Woven Cloak
items.description: Woven from threads of raw Nexus energy. The wearer exists partially across all phases, doubling phase-related bonuses.

items.name: Minor Health Potion
items.description: A small vial of red liquid. Restores a modest amount of health.

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: A standard healing potion brewed from verdant herbs. Reliably restorative.

items.name: Greater Health Potion
items.description: A potent healing draught infused with concentrated life essence.

items.name: Minor DSP Vial
items.description: A small vial of luminescent blue sap. Restores a small amount of DSP.

items.name: DSP Essence
items.description: Concentrated spiritual energy in liquid form. Restores moderate DSP.

items.name: Greater DSP Vial
items.description: A large vial of pure, crystallized DSP. Floods the spirit with renewed energy.

items.name: Antidote
items.description: A bitter tonic that neutralizes most poisons.

items.name: Guard Tonic
items.description: Thickens the skin and hardens resolve. Temporarily boosts Guard.

items.name: Speed Elixir
items.description: A shimmering elixir that accelerates the drinker's reflexes.

items.name: Invisibility Potion
items.description: Bends light around the drinker, rendering them invisible for a brief time.

items.name: Viridian Bomb
items.description: A volatile sphere of compressed nature energy. Explodes in a burst of emerald flame.

items.name: Spore Bomb
items.description: A fragile pod packed with toxic spores. Bursts on impact, poisoning everything nearby.

items.name: Flash Bomb
items.description: Detonates in a blinding flash of light. Temporarily blinds all creatures in the area.

items.name: Frost Bomb
items.description: A crystal sphere filled with condensed cold. Shatters to freeze and slow targets.

items.name: Corruption Grenade
items.description: A sealed container of concentrated corruption. Handle with extreme care.

items.name: Dreamroot Tea
items.description: A calming herbal brew made from dreamroot. Gently heals and clears the mind of afflictions.

items.name: Everspring Tea
items.description: Brewed from herbs found near the Everspring. Fortifies the spirit against all hazards.

items.name: Crimson Brew
items.description: A fiery concoction that stokes the drinker's aggression. Significantly boosts damage output.

items.name: Silver Leaf Tea
items.description: A delicate infusion of silver leaf. Sharpens the senses to a supernatural degree.

items.name: Blue Sap Tea
items.description: Sweet tea infused with blue sap crystals. Accelerates DSP recovery.

items.name: Trail Rations
items.description: Dried meat, nuts, and hardtack. Provides minor healing during rest.

items.name: Verdant Fruit
items.description: A luminous green fruit found only in the deepest groves. Slowly regenerates the eater's vitality.

items.name: Mushroom Stew
items.description: A hearty stew of enchanted forest mushrooms. Nourishes body, mind, and spirit alike.

items.name: Honey Cake
items.description: A rich cake glazed with golden forest honey. Provides a sudden burst of energy.

items.name: Sacred Nectar
items.description: Nectar harvested from the sacred blossoms of the Everwood. Fully restores the body and purges all afflictions.

items.name: Scroll of Teleport
items.description: An ancient scroll inscribed with spatial runes. Instantly transports the user to a previously visited location.

items.name: Scroll of Identify
items.description: A divination scroll that reveals the true properties of an unidentified item.

items.name: Scroll of Protection
items.description: Reading this scroll aloud erects a shimmering barrier around the user.

items.name: Scroll of Revelation
items.description: Reveals hidden doors, traps, and invisible creatures in the surrounding area.

items.name: Scroll of Unbinding
items.description: A powerful scroll that severs corruption's grip on a person, object, or area.

items.name: Shadow Essence
items.description: A vial of pure, distilled shadow. Writhes and shifts even when sealed. Required for certain rituals.

items.name: Crimson Shard
items.description: A jagged fragment of crimson crystal that pulses with inner heat. Part of something greater.

items.name: Veilkeeper Token
items.description: A carved wooden token bearing the Veilkeeper sigil. Proof of the order's trust.

items.name: Hollowroot Key
items.description: A gnarled key grown from hollowroot. Opens passages deep beneath the Everwood.

items.name: Corruption Sample
items.description: A sealed container of corrupted matter. Handle with care — researchers at the Bloomguard outpost need this.

items.name: Sacred Fire Fragment
items.description: An ember of the sacred fire, still burning after centuries. Essential for rekindling the ancient wards.

items.name: Ancient Map Fragment
items.description: A weathered piece of an ancient map. Combine fragments to reveal forgotten locations.

items.name: Faction Sigil: Bloomguard
items.description: The official sigil of the Bloomguard faction. Grants access to their strongholds.

items.name: Faction Sigil: Veilkeepers
items.description: The sacred sigil of the Veilkeeper order. Marks the bearer as an initiate.

items.name: Faction Sigil: Wildkin
items.description: A bone-and-feather sigil of the Wildkin. Accepted among the beast-speakers.

items.name: Faction Sigil: Thornbinders
items.description: A dark sigil woven from thornvine. Grants passage among the Thornbinders.

items.name: Faction Sigil: Crimson Spire
items.description: A heat-forged sigil of the Crimson Spire. Opens the way to their volcanic domain.

items.name: Faction Sigil: Hollow Court
items.description: A sigil of shadow and whisper. The Hollow Court acknowledges the bearer.

items.name: Void Crystal
items.description: A crystal suffused with void energy. It seems to absorb light and sound. Central to understanding the Void Architect's plans.

items.name: Sap Capacitor Totem
items.description: A carved totem that acts as a living battery for DSP. Can store excess spiritual energy for later use.

items.name: Ironwood Log
items.description: A log of ironwood — nearly as hard as iron but far lighter. Prized by crafters.

items.name: Emerald Dust
items.description: Fine powder ground from Everwood emeralds. Used to enchant equipment with nature magic.

items.name: Shadow Silk
items.description: Silk spun from shadow-attuned spiders. Light-absorbing and incredibly strong.

items.name: Crimson Ore
items.description: Volcanic ore infused with fire essence. Glows with inner heat when struck.

items.name: Silver Moss
items.description: A rare moss with a silvery sheen. Used in alchemical preparations and enchantments.

items.name: Blue Sap Crystal
items.description: Crystallized blue sap, dense with spiritual energy. Key ingredient in DSP-related crafting.

items.name: Thornwood Bark
items.description: Bark stripped from thornwood trees. Tough and fibrous, useful for crafting sturdy equipment.

items.name: Beast Hide
items.description: Thick hide harvested from Everwood beasts. A basic crafting material for armor.

items.name: Spore Extract
items.description: Concentrated extract from toxic forest spores. Dangerous but useful in alchemy.

items.name: Void Fragment
items.description: A shard of void energy given physical form. Warps light around itself. Used in high-tier crafting.

items.name: Ancient Resin
items.description: Petrified resin from ancient trees, hardened over centuries. Excellent for reinforcing equipment.

items.name: Crystal Shard
items.description: A small shard of Nexus crystal. Glimmers with latent energy.

items.name: Living Root
items.description: A root that still pulses with life even after being severed. Used in nature-infused crafting.

items.name: Enchanted Thread
items.description: Thread spun from enchanted fibers. Essential for magical tailoring and armor reinforcement.

items.name: Nexus Shard
items.description: A fragment of concentrated Nexus energy. Radiates power. Required for the most powerful crafting recipes.
